publishedAbstract: A NamespaceStore remains in `Creating` phase: ``` oc get namespacestores.noobaa.io-n openshift-storage s3.namespace-store.bitbucket-o yaml [...] status: conditions:- lastHeartbeatTime: "2026-02-05T11:17:55Z" lastTransitionTime: "2026-02-04T16:51:56Z" message: 'Connection name already exists: s3.namespace-store.bitbucket' reason: TemporaryError status: "False" type: Available mode: {} phase: Creating ``` Removal and recreation didn't help. Other NamespaceStores work fine.
publishedTitle: [MCG] Noobaa NamespaceStore remains in Creating state claiming "Connection name already exists"
